---
title: "Вступний модуль"
author:
  - name: Vadym Katsel [Creator & Lead Developer]
  - name: Yevhenii Kozolup [Content Consultant]
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
toc: true
lang: ua
execute:
  eval: false
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <style>
      body {
        background-image: 
          linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.90), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.90)),
          url('/courses/math-course/sources/construction.png');
        
        background-size: cover;
        background-repeat: no-repeat;
        background-attachment: fixed;
        background-position: center;
      }

      body.quarto-dark {
        background-image: 
          linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85)),
          url('/courses/math-course/sources/construction.png');
      }
    </style>
---

<div style="text-align: center; padding: 100px 20px; opacity: 0.6;">

## 🚧 Модуль у розробці
### Повертайтеся незабаром!

</div>
